topIngredients.name: Petrolatum
topIngredients.benefit: Gold standard occlusive that seals in moisture and heals cracked lips

topIngredients.name: Panthenol (B5)
topIngredients.benefit: Attracts and retains moisture in compromised lip skin

topIngredients.name: Glycerin
topIngredients.benefit: Humectant that softens and plumps dry, cracked lips

verdict: Aquaphor Lip Repair is the dermatologist-recommended first choice for severely dry or chapped lips. The petrolatum-based formula creates an occlusive barrier that heals damaged lip skin faster than any other budget option.
